rule.name: hworm and njrat ratbackdoor sysmon
rule.description: HWorm and NjRAT Rat/Backdoor Detector.  License: https://github.com/Neo23x0/sigma/blob/master/LICENSE.Detection.Rules.md.
rule.query:
rule hworm_and_njrat_ratbackdoor_sysmon {
 meta:
    author = "Alexandr Yampolskyi, SOC Prime"
    description = "HWorm and NjRAT Rat/Backdoor Detector.  License: https://github.com/Neo23x0/sigma/blob/master/LICENSE.Detection.Rules.md."

    version = "0.01"
    created = "2018/11/27"
    product = "windows"
    service = "sysmon"
    mitre = "Execution, t1204"

  events:
